title: Product defect recall alert – Alamycin LA Injection, Pen + Strep Injection
body: "We wish to advise you that Norbrook Laboratories Limited are initiating a Class III recall to wholesaler level as a precautionary measure.  This recall is for the below mentioned products and batches only:     Product Batch No Expiry Date     Alamycin LA Solution for Injection for Cattle, Sheep and Pigs 100ml (Vm 02000/ 4117) 4491-600C Dec 2026   Pen & Strep Suspension for Injection 100ml (Vm 02000/ 4100) 5033-51A Jan 2027     Norbrook Laboratories Limited is contacting wholesale dealers to examine inventory immediately and quarantine products subject to this recall.  For further information regarding the recall, please contact Ms Elaine McCullough; elaine.mccullough@norbrook.co.uk "
